title: Manaweave and Runes
description: A crossover mod of Astral Sorcery, Botania and Thaumcraft
body:
# Manaweave and Runes
Manaweave and Runes is a mod developed for the Voxelous SMP. It fuses some aspects of Astral Sorcery, Ars Nouveau and Thaumcraft  
It is unfinished, so use it with caution

## Features
- Generate different types of mana and use them to your advantage
- Perform powerful rituals using Multiblock Structurs
- Create custom spells using the _Spell Designer_
- Some building blocks to decorate your World
- Manage and control a Mana Network

## Plans for the future
- More Spell varieties
- More Rituals
- Different types of Staffs & Runes
